title: Business Development Manager - Europe
description:
About the Role

We seek a highly motivated and results-driven Business Development Manager with a strong background in electronics and business development to to drive the sales and business development in the Europe and EMEA . This role is responsible for customer acquisition, account management, distributor/agent management, and executing market expansion strategies to drive business growth.

Key Responsibilities
• Lead new customer acquisition, account management, and distributor/agent relationships across Europe and the EMEA region.
• Execute company product marketing and sales strategies to drive regional market expansion.
• Collect and analyze market intelligence on business opportunities, competitors, and industry trends.
• Prepare high-quality reports and deliver regular sales updates to headquarters.
• Build and strengthen relationships with key stakeholders to understand needs and identify upselling/cross-selling opportunities.
• Grow and retain assigned accounts by identifying expansion opportunities and ensuring customer satisfaction.
• Participate in pre-sales activities such as exhibitions, product demonstrations, technical presentations, and solution discussions.
• Engage with customers to understand requirements and propose tailored solutions.
• Support development of sales proposals, quotations, and presentations.
• Conduct competitive analysis and determine market pricing for various customer segments.

Requirements
• Degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics, Business Administration, or a related field.
• Minimum 5 years of sales, business development, and management experience in the memory semiconductor industry.
• Proven track record in customer development and distributor management, with exposure to Europe and EMEA.
• Strong analytical, reporting, communication, and presentation skills.
• Willingness to travel frequently across the region for customer visits and business development.
• Ability to work independently, managing full business operations in the region.
• Self-motivated, adaptable, and able to perform under pressure in a fast-paced environment.

If you are driven, ambitious, and eager to take on the challenge of expanding our business across Europe , EMEA, we invite you to join us on this exciting journey. This role offers a unique opportunity to make a direct impact and grow with a company at the forefront of the memory semiconductor industry.

postedCompany.description:
Flexxon provides specialized design-in services worldwide supply chain solutions for Flash-based storage solutions - NAND Solution Products; serving specifically the INDUSTRIAL, MEDICAL & AUTOMOTIVE (IMA) sectors.

Collaboration with World NAND Solution Technology leader and provider, Flexxon offer leading edge Flash-based storage products with exceptional performance and outstanding reliability.

Flexxon Flash-based storage product range:

  • SSD
  • NAND Flash Modules
  • Storage Cards
  • Drive with variety of interfaces support.
  • Special capacity and customized features according to customer requirement
postedCompany.name: FLEXXON PTE. LTD.
